rationale: The citing study builds a structural demand–supply model with retailer/manufacturer pricing in grocery scanner data, and the cited paper is an empirical joint demand-plus-retailer-pricing framework in scanner data with decomposition of retail price drivers. This strong methodological and domain overlap (retailer pricing behavior, random-coefficients demand, pricing equations) makes the citation plausibly substantive as a method/foundation source, not an obvious incidental mention. Although the raw evidence is only a DOI match (no quoted citation context), it is not safe to drop.
